mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.remarks, t0.back_compensation_amount, t0.back_interest, t0.back_liquidated_damages, t0.back_other_fees, t0.adjust_trial_date, t0.adjust_code, t0.filing_court_name, t0.judge_name, t0.filling_date, t0.litigation_type, t0.filling_code, t0.judge_date, t0.court_session_date
